sentences.english: I decided to cycle to work today, I usually bring some clothes to change into, but today I got here and saw that I'd left my trousers at home — it was a real facepalm moment!
sentences.korean: 오늘 자전거로 출근했는데, 보통 갈아입을 옷을 가져오거든요. 근데 와보니 바지를 집에 두고 왔어요 — 진짜 페이스팜 순간이었어요!

sentences.english: A facepalm is where you have your head against the palm of your hand because you're embarrassed or frustrated.
sentences.korean: 페이스팜은 창피하거나 좌절해서 손바닥에 머리를 대는 거예요.

sentences.english: A facepalm moment is a moment where something like that happens.
sentences.korean: 페이스팜 순간은 그런 일이 일어나는 순간이에요.
창피하거나 한심한 순간 (얼굴을 손으로 가리는 동작에서 유래)

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
